summary: iOS | Images in User Guides section (PLACEHOLDER)
scenario: Device images fail to load in User Guides section under App Settings for devices beyond the top 6, showing placeholders instead
description_clean: In the User Guides section under App Settings, only images for the top 6 devices are loaded; all other device images show placeholders instead of loading properly.
steps: Scroll through the list of supported devices
Observe the device images for the first 6 devices
Continue scrolling to view devices beyond the top 6
expected: All device images in the User Guides section should load properly regardless of position in the list.
actual: Only images for the top 6 devices are loaded; all other device images show placeholders instead of loading properly.
